title: orchis ochrantha
intro: Orchis ochrantha, also known as the man orchid or cat's eye orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Orchis ochrantha include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary problems. Herbal preparations of Orchis ochrantha are typically made by infusing the plant's roots and leaves in water or by decocting them in a solvent, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
